sutta: now the variable samadhi visited the variable sariputta saluted him and sat down at 1 side and the variables sarkuta spoke to him so seated what samidhi is the basis of purposive thoughts sankapabitaka or sometimes translated intentional thoughts and he answered mentality more mentality materialities what gives them their variety the elements what gives rise to them contact wherein have they common ground in feeling when are they at their best in a state of concentration what is that master state mindfulness what is that still high estate wisdom what is their very essence the giving of liberation wherein are they finally merged in the deathless such samidhi other questions and such are your answers well done well done samidhi well have you answered the questions put to you but be not vain on that account that's the end of the suta
commentary: this is 1 of the sutas which is quite deep and we have to think about it so i'll just comment that the basis of purposive thoughts or intentional thoughts here is said to be na marupa and nama rupa is mentality materiality that means phenomena phenomena that consciousness is conscious of usually quite often nama rupa is translated as wrongly translated as mind and matter but if dharma is mine then the basis of purposive thoughts should be mine should be nama but here it is not number the basis of purposive thoughts is phenomena mentality materiality nama is does not incorporate consciousness now that 2 there are several types of data the 4 great elements earth what if i win but they are not actually earth water vibe with the uh the characteristics of earth represents hardness water represents cohesion [Music] fire represents heat wind represents motion would also refer to the 18 elements the sixth sense organs the eye ear nose tongue body and mind and the sixth sense falcons the sixth sense objects of uh form sound smell taste touch and thoughts and the 6 consciousness these are the 18 elements i could also refer tattoo could also refer to the 6 elements the 4 great elements earth water fire wind glass space plus consciousness the nexus is
